name: The Witcher Rp
description: The Witcher RPG! Time line set after the events of Loc Muine, King's Foltlest, Dameved are dead, Cintra fell long ago in Nilfgardian Invasion, Temeria and Aedir quickly followed now without monarch to keep the Nilfgardians at bay, The Continent now torn between two sides, on one side of Pontar Nilfgardian Empire, on the Other Radovid and what remains of Norther Kingdoms. Fragile peace is what awaits the suffering people, In the North kingdoms witches are hunted down branded as treasonous by Radovids witch hunters. In the East they are being locked up by Emperor Emhyr war Emreis order to be used but not free. And in between of that Free City of Novigrad city state looking onto the both sides of Pontar valley awaiting what fate awaits it. Where will you place yourself in all this chaos?
creator: ReinhardEhrlich
